messages.content: Fae, use read_screen to tell me what is on the display and list three visible UI elements.

Let me check that for you. The screen shows the YouTube Premium interface, currently playing a video of OpenAI CEO Sam Altman speaking about AI scaling and infrastructure needs. The video was uploaded 23 hours ago by DRM News with over 35k views. Three visible interactive elements are, the Subscribe button, the Like button showing 646 likes, and an open comment section displaying user comments below the video player.
